subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letters were perused and their meaning was fully understood, in truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکاتیب ملاحظه گردید و بر معانی اطلاع حاصل گشت فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
